projectDescription: A simple distributed voting application demonstrating multi-container Docker deployments across Compose, Swarm, and Kubernetes.
keyFeatures: Multi-container distributed application using Docker Compose
Docker Swarm stack deployment with multiple replicas
Kubernetes deployment with full YAML specifications
Node.js real-time results display via Socket.IO
.NET worker service consuming votes from Redis queue
Redis message queue for vote ingestion
PostgreSQL persistent storage for vote results
Configurable vote options via environment variables
publicApiSurface: OPTION_A environment variable (vote option, default: Cats)
OPTION_B environment variable (vote option, default: Dogs)
